User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Sitemap
Sitemap: https://happinessplaza.com/sitemap.xml

# Crawl-delay
Crawl-delay: 10

# Disallow admin and private areas
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /private/
Disallow: /api/

# Allow specific bots
User-agent: Googlebot
Allow: /

User-agent: Bingbot
Allow: /

User-agent: Slurp
Allow: /
